summary: FQ-12 closes a reliable food loop beyond berry bushes. One context key (farm_action = G) drives player.try_farm: aiming at dirt/grass tills it into farm_soil (world.till_soil); aiming at an air cell sitting directly on farm_soil plants a crop_seedling (world.plant_crop), consuming one crop_seeds from the backpack. world._tick_crop_growth (run each _process) ripens a seedling to crop_ripe after CROP_GROW_SECONDS (60s) but only on tilled soil; unsupported crops are removed (crops never float), crops whose cell was mined/replaced simply drop their timer (never regrow into an invalid cell), and crops never reschedule like berry bushes. Harvesting (mining) crop_ripe yields 3 food + 1 seed. The loop bootstraps from a single bush via craft_seeds (1 food -> 2 seeds, hand recipe). New data: farm_soil/crop_seedling/crop_ripe blocks (crops requires_support, non-solid, non-placeable; crop_ripe drops food+seed) and crop_seeds/soil/crop items. crop_growth timers serialize/parse like bush regrowth (save_manager + world.setup), break_block and the load-time support sweep clear them, and world.farm_tile_count() (tilled soil + crop cells) is a food-yard score exposed in game_root.summary() for future base levels. Fixed an uncommitted parse-error hang (var target := world.block_at(cell) could not infer a type because player.world is typed Node2D, breaking player.gd load and hanging the headless smoke) by annotating var target: String. Suite 269 -> 276 (7 fq12_* checks); validator enforces the farming blocks + seeds contract; capsule doctor healthy.
scope: FQ-12 per docs/FABLE_TASK_QUEUE.md - plantable/growable/harvestable crops on the requires_support groundwork, a food bootstrap recipe, crop-timer persistence, and a food-yard score. No new world-gen, no combat change, no NPC labor.
next_action: FQ-13: enemy variety and combat pressure (thornrat, ore tick, raider torchbearer). Crop/soil icons via docs/ASSET_ROADMAP.md.
